notes: The sensory bin contents are described broadly as 'various small items like leaves, stones, and plastic animals' — additional items may be present but are not specified. The small light-colored objects on the round table are not identified by type. It is unclear whether the round table and benches are part of the active play zone or simply nearby furniture. Wooden chairs brought to the bin during the session may have originated from elsewhere in the room.
